def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    rsi_threshold = params['rsi_threshold']
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window)
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    atr_expansion = atr.average_true_range() > atr.average_true_range().shift(1)
    long_signal = (rsi < rsi_threshold) & atr_expansion
    short_signal = (rsi > (100 - rsi_threshold)) & atr_expansion
    signals = pd.Series(np.where(long_signal, 1, np.where(short_signal, -1, 0)), index=df.index)
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: USD/CHF exhibits volatility expansion patterns, where price breaks out of consolidation when RSI indicates oversold/overbought conditions.
